features.name: Checkpoint hook
features.description: PostToolUse.sh counts Edit/Write/NotebookEdit every 5 in HEO_UPGRADE-active projects; session-start.sh resets counter

features.name: Brainstorm skill
features.description: Divergent → convergent ideation; outputs BRAINSTORM.md; prd-creator Step 0 consumption added

features.name: Handoff skill v1.1
features.description: 5-phase session-end ceremony with 4 modes (heo-active/heo-general/meta/anomaly) and 3 tiers (Light/Standard/Advanced)

features.name: Architecture-sketch skill
features.description: Pre-init-project skill; surfaces tech stack, folder layout, alternatives as ARCHITECTURE_PROPOSAL.md

features.name: Init-project enhancement
features.description: Consume ARCHITECTURE_PROPOSAL.md; install language packs into .claude/rules/<lang>.md

features.name: Feature-plan skill
features.description: Live per-feature plan reading Architecture + lessons-learned + instincts + HANDOFF.md

steps: Step 1: Create SKILL.md — 6-step flow (Read context → Analyze → Present plan → Confirm → Save to feature_list.json → Begin implementation)
Step 2: Update resume-heo — auto-invoke feature-plan after user confirms feature in State A/B, update Hard Rules
Step 3: Self-apply — save F007 plan field to feature_list.json as dogfood validation
Step 4: QA — verify file structure, line count ≤ 200, quality checks, resume-heo integration
risks: instincts: 설계 리뷰만으로는 edge case 못 찾음 — self-apply(Step 3)로 대응
verification: feature_list.json has plan field for F007

features.name: Verify-stack skill
features.description: Multi-layer review: self-review + security (static+LLM) + cross-model (Gemini); tiered failure modes

steps: Step 1: Create SKILL.md — frontmatter + 3-layer flow (Security hard-block → Self-review confirm → Cross-model warn)
Step 2: Security layer — static rule patterns (secrets, SQLi, XSS, command injection, hardcoded creds, path traversal) + LLM false-positive suppression
Step 3: Cross-model layer — Gemini CLI detection, graceful skip when absent, conditional triggers (diff>100 / confidence<70% / --strict)
Step 4: verify-report output format — structured markdown consumed by feature-done
Step 5: Self-apply — run verify-stack on F008 itself for dogfood validation
risks: Gemini CLI not installed → cross-model layer must gracefully skip without breaking other layers
Static security rules too broad for non-dev projects → limit to 6 universal patterns, no language-specific linting
instincts: design review alone misses edge cases → self-apply in Step 5

features.name: Feature-done enhancement
features.description: Consume verify-report; visual check if UI; record successes (not just failures)

steps: Step 1: Add Step 1-B — verify-report consumption between Step 1 and Step 2 (read report, gate on FIX_REQUIRED, delete after done)
Step 2: Add visual check conditional in Step 2 QA (browser check if UI feature, graceful skip)
Step 3: Add success recording in Step 2-A (append to instincts.md after QA passes)
Step 4: Self-apply (dogfood) — run feature-done on F009 itself to validate new logic
risks: Line budget tight: 184 + ~16 = 200 max. Must be concise.
verification: 3 new sections exist (verify-report, visual check, success recording)
verify-report consumption matches verify-stack output format

features.name: Reflect skill
features.description: Periodic instinct extraction from failures AND successes; confidence-graded; user confirms before committing

steps: Step 1: Create SKILL.md — trigger definition + 3-phase flow (Collect → Analyze → Confirm)
Step 2: Collect logic — gather from instincts.md (low entries), lessons-learned.md, recent commits/progress.md
Step 3: Pattern analysis + confidence upgrade — 2+ observations → low→medium, 3+ → medium→high; merge duplicates
Step 4: User confirmation UI — present extracted patterns in Korean, user approves/edits/rejects each
Step 5: Self-apply (dogfood) — run reflect on current 2 instincts entries to validate
risks: instincts: design review alone misses edge cases → self-apply in Step 5
verification: Self-apply produces pattern analysis from current instincts.md
No instincts.md modification without user confirmation

features.name: Project-doctor skill
features.description: Health check: CLAUDE.md size, Architecture.md drift, feature_list.json drift, stale lessons, unused skills

steps: Step 1: Create SKILL.md — 5 health checks + report format + user-selectable fix flow
Step 2: Self-apply (dogfood) — run project-doctor on current HEO_UPGRADE project
Step 3: QA — verify file structure, check behavior, update feature_list.json
risks: Architecture.md absent in some projects — graceful skip required
verification: Missing files handled as N/A, not errors

features.name: Confidence tagging
features.description: Cross-cutting convention: [verified]/[high]/[medium]/[guess] tags on framework outputs

steps: Step 1: Create ~/.claude/rules/confidence-tags.md — 4-tag definition, criteria, examples (global rule)
Step 2: Update 4 skill SKILL.md files — add tagging instructions to output templates
Step 3: Self-apply (dogfood) — verify tags appear in session outputs
Step 4: QA — file existence, tag consistency, non-destructive to existing skills
risks: Global rule file applies to all projects, not just HEO_UPGRADE — intended behavior since tags are universal convention
verification: 4 skill SKILL.md files have tagging instructions
No conflict with existing instincts.md confidence format

features.name: Cost awareness
features.description: Cross-cutting: estimated context size, subagent multiplier, .claude/cost-log.jsonl

steps: Step 1: Create ~/.claude/rules/cost-awareness.md — cost estimation convention + cost-log.jsonl format
Step 2: Update verify-stack/SKILL.md — cost warning before Layer 3 cross-model
Step 3: Update architecture-sketch/SKILL.md — cost note for alternatives analysis
Step 4: Update reflect/SKILL.md — cost note for history scanning
Step 5: Self-apply (dogfood) — verify cost notes appear in session
risks: Token estimation is inherently approximate — use relative sizes (small/medium/large)
Too many cost warnings cause user fatigue — apply only to expensive skills
verification: cost-awareness.md exists with cost-log format definition
3 skill SKILL.md files have cost-related sections
Self-apply demonstrates actual cost note output

features.name: Pre-ship-check skill
features.description: Verify all features pass, unresolved warnings, secrets check, README, deploy target

features.name: Deploy skill
features.description: Deployment command, git tag, rollback info in deploy-history.json

features.name: Monitor skill
features.description: Lightweight deployment reachability check; suggests rollback if broken
